series_metadata.series_description: Requests and approval workflows for all draw game promotions; Includes retailer, chain, district, regional and statewide promotions.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain all statewide promotions for three (3) years in system; move to cold storage for three (3) years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain all individual retailer, chain, region, district promotions for one (1) year in system; move to cold storage for three (3) years, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Electronic: Delete
